documentation.description:
===========================================================================

  This package is implementing the capability for the
  temperature sensor MC9808 using the I2C protocol.

===========================================================================

  Copyright 2025 (C) Holger Rodriguez

  SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause

simple_types.name: Celsius
simple_types.code:
type Celsius is delta Temperature_Divider_Fraction
range -256.0 .. (2.0 ** 8) - Temperature_Divider_Fraction;

documentation.description: this is the range, what the sensor can read

simple_types.name: Hysteresis
simple_types.code:
type Hysteresis is (Zero,
                    One_Half,
                    Three,
                   Six);

simple_types.name: MCP9808_Status

enumeration_literals.name: Init_Error
enumeration_literals.description:
Is set,
if anything is not OK with the I2C operation

simple_types.name: Resolution

record_types.name: Ambient_Status
Op_Status
